positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical celestial forest scene featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and gentle, nebula-inspired geometric patterns. The composition must be perfectly centered and designed as a repeating, seamless silhouette suitable for apparel. Use deep indigo, royal purple, warm gold, and teal as the primary color palette, achieving strong contrast against a dark background. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and minimalist graphic design, rendered with sharp lines and perfect symmetry. The overall aesthetic must be clean, highly graphic, and visually arresting, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blur, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifact, messy, amateur, low detail, jpeg artifacts, poor anatomy, extra limbs, asymmetrical, discolored
